race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Dragonboosts Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner scottish king (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Scottish King with 32.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Scottish King > Minella Kaiser, but actual result was Scottish King (IRE) > Felton Bellevue (FR). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
